name: Medium-Wash Slim-Fit Jeans
description: Medium-wash blue slim-fit jeans in soft cotton-denim blend. Clean five-pocket cut with a slight stretch for all-day comfort — the everyday blue that works with every shirt.

name: Dark Indigo Slim-Fit Jeans
description: Dark indigo slim-fit jeans in mid-weight denim. Clean hem, five-pocket cut and dependable tapered leg — smart enough to dress up with a button-down, easy enough with a tee.

name: Premium Dark Indigo Straight Jeans
description: Premium dark indigo jeans in heavyweight denim with a straight-through leg. Deep, even wash and reinforced stitching — the dressy blue jean for evenings out.

name: Washed Black Slim Jeans
description: Washed-black slim jeans with a slight fade for a worn-in look. Tapered leg, clean five-pocket cut — pairs with anything from a white tee to a crisp dress shirt.
